description:
A call center operations manager needs to onboard a new outbound sales agent. Create a new user account in the Vicidial administration panel at http://localhost/vicidial/admin.php (credentials: user 6666, password andromeda) with the following settings:

- User (login ID): 2001
- Password: EastSales2024
- Full Name: Maria Gonzalez
- User Level: 1
- User Group: ADMIN
- Active: Y
- Phone Login: 201
- Phone Pass: test1234
- Hotkeys Active: 1 (enabled)
- Scheduled Callbacks: 1 (enabled)

Ensure all specified fields are correctly configured and saved in the system.
